CREATE TABLE sales (id INT, amount FLOAT, sale_date DATE);
SELECT last_value(amount IGNORE NULLS) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS last_amount FROM sales;
CREATE TABLE employees (id INT, name VARCHAR, department_id INT);
CREATE TABLE departments (id INT, department_name VARCHAR);

SELECT e.name, last_value(d.department_name IGNORE NULLS) OVER (PARTITION BY e.department_id ORDER BY e.id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS last_department FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id;
CREATE TABLE transactions (transaction_id INT, user_id INT, amount FLOAT);

SELECT user_id, last_value(amount IGNORE NULLS) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY transaction_id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS last_transaction_amount FROM transactions;
SELECT user_id, last_value(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY transaction_id ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS last_transaction_amount FROM transactions;

WITH ranked_sales AS (SELECT id, amount, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY amount DESC) AS rank FROM sales) SELECT last_value(amount IGNORE NULLS) OVER (ORDER BY rank ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS last_ranked_amount FROM ranked_sales;
SELECT last_value(NULLIF(amount, 0) IGNORE NULLS) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS last_non_zero_sales FROM sales;
